programme.desc: Kinara, a kind-hearted girl who is the backbone of her family. programme.title: Neng Pete Bau Cintanya Warbiyasah

Superbuns
programme.desc: Buns breaks MeeMaw's remote and tries to fix it with homemade buttons.

programme.title: Ready, Steady, Wiggle!
programme.desc: The Wiggles explore their feelings and learn how to express and manage their emotions with the help of Dr. Emotions; shuffle dancing with Tsehay in Hey Tsehay; leaping like a frog in Wiggle and Move.

programme.title: Barney's World
programme.desc: When Mel discovers that the sunglasses she found belonged to Grady, she refuses to return them anyway; Barney invents a sea adventure in which Mel realizes she is behaving like a pirate.

programme.title: Miss Persona
programme.desc: Brandon Bear has trouble taking a nap because his bed is filled with a mountain of his toys; Miss Persona becomes a game show host to help him pick just one toy.

programme.title: Toon Bops
programme.desc: Miranda the Panda and Mark the Shark sing about all the best parts of friendship.

programme.title: Peppa Pig
programme.desc: The family shops at the supermarket; Peppa celebrates her birthday with a party; the Pigs make home movies; Peppa's playgroup puts on a play.

programme.title: Rubble & Crew
programme.desc: Builder Cove needs a post office but when construction gets squirrely, it's up to the pups to find a construction solution; using construction skills to convert the super car wash and clean Farmer Zoe's extra muddy animals.

programme.title: Batwheels
programme.desc: When Poison Ivy uses a special flower that emits a rare pollen to put Gotham to sleep, Bibi must save her friends and bring back order.

programme.title: Bugs Bunny Builders
programme.desc: The Mouse Sisters hire The Looney Builders to build a cheese café featuring a mural by Sylvester, who is having a bad day.

programme.title: Thomas & Friends: All Engines Go
programme.desc: Thomas, Kana, and Diesel race to see who can go the slowest; Bruno and the engines team up to complete an urgent delivery in windy weather.

programme.title: Team Mekbots: Animal Rescue
programme.desc: Team Mekbots rescues a bear cub who refuses to hibernate before a blizzard hits, three vervet monkeys caught in rushing river rapids and a beaver family in the American Northwest from a wildfire.

programme.title: Rubble & Crew
programme.desc: Builder Cove gets its first hotel when Farmer Zoe's brother Hadley comes to visit; after a hiking trail sign mix-up confuses everyone going to Mr. Ducky-Doo's birthday party, Rubble and Crew help them get back on track.

programme.title: Hamsters of Hamsterdale
programme.desc: A motley crew of hamsters mistake their 8-year-old owner Harry as their King and beloved ruler of their elaborate, colorful-tubed kingdom.

programme.title: PAW Patrol
programme.desc: A comet is coming, and the PAW Patrol gets to work building a giant observatory; when the observatory starts rolling out of control, Rubble and the pups need to rebuild everything it has destroyed.

programme.title: Sesame Street
programme.desc: Alan has many food deliveries to make at Hooper's and needs vehicles to finish them; Elmo, Charlie, and Rosita help Alan by riding their scooter and bikes to deliver food to customers.

programme.title: Sesame Street
programme.desc: Elmo keeps practicing and does not give up until he learns how to play "Twinkle Twinkle Little Star" on his piano.

programme.title: Peppa Pig
programme.desc: Dr. Hamster has brought a giant ant farm and opens the ant farm's lid to show how they got in; nobody noticed they escaped and starting moving things in the classroom; the children place food around to lead the ants safely back.

programme.title: Duck Camp Dinners
programme.desc: After a morning on the Bayou, the Duck Camp Dinners crew enjoy a fresh cooked dinner while discussing the changing coastal wetlands of Louisiana. Jean-Paul gets to finally a hunt an area he had only heard about as a young man, and takes in the beauty of the live cypress trees this camp is known for.

programme.title: Duck Camp Dinners
programme.desc: After a late night of good times, venison chili, and some old school roux the crew heads out for another day of hunting ducks. Adaptability is critical, and after a couple of quick adjustments the team finds themselves back in the ducks.

programme.title: Strangers in Danger
programme.desc: In the South American country of Bolivia, Catfish and Rooftop put their bravery to the test. This duo goes 0 for 2 in the ring testing out their fight skills participating in traditional Tinku fighting and getting smacked down by Bolivia's Fighting Cholitas. They also face a sketchy ride up death rode just to mountain bike down an equally dangerous path. Catfish has yet to keep a meal down as our

programme.title: Strangers in Danger
programme.desc: In the most action packed trip yet, Rooftop and Catfish's trip to Thailand has them face to face with the country's nature. They wrestle a crocodile, charm a cobra, and get a massage from an elephant that's somehow more relaxing than the traditional Thai massages they tried out. The two even attempt to catch (cooked) flying chickens on their heads. Things relaxed in Thailand for a moment when the

programme.title: Billy Goes North
programme.desc: Billy and Terry make an urgent call to a wedding venue where wild turkeys are threatening to ruin the big day. Then Billy responds to an apartment where poisonous exotic pets are threatening the homeowner.

programme.title: Billy Goes North
programme.desc: Billy and Beekeeper Ian extract a bee colony from a family home, then Billy has to dodge talons and beak to remove a Great Horned Owl from a house.

programme.title: Secrets of the Great White Shark 2024
programme.desc: Feature documentary studying the history of the sharks species, alongside their anatomy and how they've helped our oceans for hundreds of millions of years. However, in the modern age they face extinction and demonisation. Over 1000 million sharks are killed every year, and it is up to us to save them.

programme.title: David Attenborough A Life on Earth
programme.desc: The incredible journey and illustrious career of one of the most travelled men in history, this documentary tells the story of how Sir David Attenborough came to be the voice of modern natural history programs by bringing the natural world into our homes.

programme.title: Bear Grylls: Face the Wild Season 1
programme.desc: Once homeless and a teen-mom, Dot leaves the big city for a much needed adventure alongside Bear Grylls. She's overcome life's biggest challenges but has never tackled the wild. Her emotional journey is a truly inspiring tale of survival.

programme.title: To Catch A Killer
programme.desc: An intuitive but troubled police officer is recruited by an FBI expert to stop a relentless shooter who is terrorizing Baltimore.

programme.title: Last Night In Soho
programme.desc: Eloise, an aspiring designer, finds herself transported to 1960s London, where she meets rising singer Sandie. But the glittering world hides dark secrets as her vivid visions turn unsettling.

programme.title: Bleeding Steel
programme.desc: A Special Forces Agent is assigned to protect a scientist and his creation from a sinister gang.

programme.title: Fast Five
programme.desc: Dominic Toretto and his crew of street racers plan a massive heist to buy their freedom while in the sights of a powerful Brazilian drug lord and a dangerous federal agent.

programme.title: The Foreigner
programme.desc: Businessman with a buried past seeks justice when his daughter is killed in an act of terrorism. A cat-and-mouse conflict ensues with a government official, whose past may hold clues to the killers' identities.

programme.title: Fast & Furious
programme.desc: When fugitive Dominic Toretto returns to Los Angeles to avenge a loved one's death, it reignites his feud with agent Brian O'Conner. But, as they race through crowded city streets and across international lines, they must test their loyalties by joining together to bring down a shared enemy.

programme.desc: Stephanie is a single mother who befriends Emily, an upper-class woman who has a child at the same elementary school. When Emily goes missing, Stephanie takes it upon herself to investigate.

programme.desc: In a fictional American desert town circa 1955, the Junior Stargazer/Space Cadet convention is about to be spectacularly upended by world-changing events.

programme.desc: Trapped in a flooded cave, a group of adventurers fighting for survival realise they have another thing to worry about: a pack of hungry crocodiles.

programme.title: Notorious Nick
programme.desc: Nick Newell, a one-armed MMA fighter, gets a rare chance to fight for the lightweight championship. He strives to win for himself and all the other people in the world with physical challenges.
